data.title: Japan and the US divided over how trade deal profits will be split
data.description:
The United States and Japan are at odds over how to divide profits from a newly signed trade and investment package announced last Tuesday. Both governments have agreed to a $550 billion economic framework involving tariffs and joint investments, but there’s a rift over how returns from the deal will be shared between the two […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-and-the-us-divided-over-trade-profits/

data.title: Ethereum exit queue reaches all-time high in record validator withdrawal
data.description:

data.title: Is $1 Dogecoin ‚Inevitable‘? Analyst Cites Perfect Storm Of Factors
data.description:
Dogecoin could be approaching a structural breakout that carries it to the long-discussed $1 threshold, according to crypto analyst Stephan Burns, who in a July 24 livestream described a “perfect storm” of monetary design, market structure and what he characterizes as rare astrological alignments. Burns framed the move as an “inevitability,” while acknowledging timing uncertainty, arguing that the next parabolic advance could emerge within months. Is $1 Dogecoin Inevitable? Burns built his case first on tokenomics. Dogecoin’s fixed issuance of 10,000 DOGE per one-minute block—approximately 5
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/is-1-dogecoin-inevitable-analyst-perfect-storm/

data.title: Senator Cynthia Lummis hails “historic week” as crypto legislation advances in congress
data.description:
25-7-2025 – Wyoming Senator Cynthia Lummis declared the United States is finally catching up on cryptocurrency policy following what she called a “historic legislative week” that saw major crypto bills advance through Congress. Speaking on Cointelegraph’s “Decentralize” podcast, Lummis highlighted two critical developments: the GENIUS Act enabling payment stablecoins was signed into law by President [. .

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences Significant Liquidations in 24 Hours
data.description: According to PANews, the cryptocurrency market witnessed substantial liquidations amounting to $517 million over the past 24 hours. Data from Coinglass reveals that long positions accounted for $101 million of the liquidations, while short positions totaled $415 million. Bitcoin (BTC) saw liquidations reaching $164 million, and Ethereum (ETH) experienced liquidations totaling $118 million.

data.title: Ex-BlackRock exec Joseph Chalom joins Sharplink as Co-CEO
data.description:
25-7-2025 – Major Ethereum holder Sharplink has appointed former BlackRock managing director Joseph Chalom as co-CEO, intensifying the corporate battle for Ethereum treasury dominance as institutional players scramble to expand their digital asset positions. Chalom officially joined Sharplink on July 24, bringing extensive experience from his role overseeing digital assets, strategic partnerships, and investments at [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/ex-blackrock-exec-joseph-chalom-joins-sharplink-as-co-ceo/
